sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking [52, 10]
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    
    # Compare segmentation
    before_seg = before.segmentation
    after_seg = after.segmentation
    
    # Find differences in object counts and positions
    before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}
    
    print("=== Before click ===")
    for n in before_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'r' or n['color'] == 'B':
            b = n['boundary']
            if b:
                print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={b}")
    
    print("\n=== After click ===")
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'r' or n['color'] == 'B':
            b = n['boundary']
            if b:
                print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={b}")
    
    # Check timer
    before_timer = before.ascii.split('\n')[63].count('G')
    after_timer = after.ascii.split('\n')[63].count('G')
    print(f"\nTimer: {before_timer} -> {after_timer} G pixels")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
